description: The result of a log export operation, containing a page of records.
name: LogExportResult

nextSliceKey.description: Cursor for the next page of export results.

results.description: The list of exported log records on this page.

items.description: A log record retrieved from the Dynatrace Grail data lakehouse. Contains the original log content plus enriched metadata added by Dynatrace during ingestion and processing.

timestamp.description: The timestamp of the log record in ISO 8601 format.

severity.description: The severity level of the log record.

log.source.description: The source identifier of the log record.

additionalFields.description: Additional fields present in the log record beyond the standard set. Content varies based on what was ingested and how OpenPipeline processed the record.
